message:
fix(web): restore desktop mousewheel page scroll

Two issues fixed:

1. SequenceView wheel handler was on the entire container, capturing
   wheel events even over header controls. Moved to canvas wrapper only.

2. Lenis smooth scroll was intercepting wheel events but couldn't scroll
   anything because .app-shell has overflow:hidden and .app-body is the
   actual scroll container. Disabled Lenis entirely since the app uses
   custom scroll containers.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
